title: 2026/03/02 - ENV (Part 2 of 2)
description: Monday, 2nd March 2026 | Environment Committee Planning Bill; Natural Environment Bill Hearing of evidence: Oceana Gold Nelson City Council Nick Smith, Mayor Taranaki Regional Council Craig Williamson, TRC Chair Steve Ruru, TRC Chief Executive Finbar Kiddle, TRC Strategy Lead Auckland Council Councillor Richard Hills, Chair of the Policy, Planning and Development Committee Councillor Julie Fairey, Deputy Chair of the Policy, Planning and Development Committee Megan Tyler, Director Policy, Planning and Governance Voluntary Heritage Group Philip Barry, Convenor Greater Wellington Regional Council Councillor Adrienne Staples, Deputy Council Chair Councillor Quentin Duthie, Environment & Climate Committee Chair Richard Sheild, Project Lead, Policy Michelle Conland, Lead Consenting Advisor Te Runanga o Ngati Ruanui Trust Graham Young, Strategy and Planning – Environmental Manager Nicola Coogan, Strategy and Planning Rachel Rae, Chief Executive Dr Carwyn Jones Ben Ross Kat Macmillan Judy Lawrence Craig Pauling Dr Marie Doole The New Zealand King Salmon Co Limited Quentin Davies, Solicitor Peter Law Mathias Schaeffner
descriptionSummary: Planning Bill. Planning Bill; Natural Environment Bill. Oceana Gold
